# health-id positive corpus — each line should trigger the detector
# Health insurance member IDs with contextual keywords
Member ID: UHC12345678 — Blue Cross health insurance card
subscriber id: A123456789 health plan member card
Health plan member number: BC987654321 active coverage
My insurance member ID is UHC00112233 for the appointment
Group number 45678 member ID XYZ9876543 health coverage
Insurance card shows member ID: HM234567890 Blue Shield
Policy member id A987654321 in the Blue Cross network
